cycle_4903_directive.bolt:
P0 → #551 [PERF-VERIFY-PHASE4] Playwright + lighthouse-ci script: create scripts/lighthouse-perf.ts that boots Playwright chromium (headless, --no-sandbox --disable-gpu), navigates admin-dashboard/admin-products/admin-orders/admin-mailbox + /account via next-auth session cookie, pipes to lighthouse programmatic API with { port: browser.port } — Trace C4900 proved npx lighthouse CDP is dead end (3 chromium binaries NO_FCP / Connection closed), so this is the only viable Phase 4 verification path. Capture LCP/TBT/CLS before/after per #526-#530 admin bundle + #530 /account cache sweep; output docs/audits/perf-verify-phase4-2026-04-25.md with before/after table. Save intermediate JSON reports to /tmp/lh-*.json. If auth-cookie creation is a blocker, hardcode a dev-only LH_SESSION_TOKEN env var that the script reads and injects — document the Dev-only path clearly. Verify with npm run build + tsc + lint clean.

P1 → #552 [WISHLIST-SOLD-ITEM] wire up the already-existing WishlistSubscription model (prisma/schema.prisma:290-301) which has zero TS references. Scope: (a) POST /api/wishlist/subscribe {productId, email} upserts row, (b) small PDP subscribe widget (email input + submit) rendered when product.sold=false — copy: 'Dejte vědět, až bude prodaný — pošleme vám podobné kousky.' (c) Cron /api/cron/wishlist-sold-notify (requireCronSecret) scans WishlistSubscription rows where product.sold=true AND notifiedAt IS NULL, sends wishlist-sold email (template exists per C2289 scout + matches abandoned-cart structure), sets notifiedAt=now. Register cron in vercel.json @hourly. Once-Again case study = 40% email CR — highest-leverage single-file feature landing. Verify lint 0/0 + tsc 0 + build green.

P2 → #545 [PERF-PHASE5-P5e] vaul drawer: per C4901 DEMOTE — investigation-only, NO production code change yet. Run @next/bundle-analyzer with vaul imports temporarily stubbed (null component via local npm link or manual swap in node_modules), measure actual /products + /products/[slug] + mobile-filter delta. File findings as docs/audits/vaul-bundle-impact-2026-04-25.md with pass/fail on whether 18.5KB gzip is worth the dynamic-import ssr:false wrapper complexity. 8th cycle stalled C4893→C4903 — if investigation doc doesn't land this cycle either, CANCEL #545 next cycle and pivot Phase 5 to #554 sold-PDP cross-sell.
cycle_4903_directive.sage: P0 → continue #494 email templates brand polish. #549 welcome email LANDED C4902 (dbd216f) — Janička eyebrow + display heading + 3-perk list + /account CTA + renderShopLink + renderAboutValues footer shipped clean. Next template: review-request post-ship+7d (exists per C4900 verification — just needs brand pass matching welcome+abandoned-cart structure). After review-request → password-reset (transactional, no unsubscribe, FROM_INFO). Then win-back (marketing, WITH unsubscribe, FROM_NEWS). 4 templates left of 21 per C4898 research — at 1/cycle we're 4 cycles out from full coverage. Commit per-template. #534 live SMTP smoke still bectly-gated on @vryp.cz creds.
cycle_4903_directive.trace: P0 → #367 [AUDIT] codebase quality sweep continuation — 7 cycles C4895→C4903 of Trace selecting audit work is decisive signal, align with it. #367 IS audit work; addenda to docs/audits/codebase-sweep-2026-04-18.md remain valuable per Row V four-axis review. Focus this cycle on (a) Phase 5 consolidated summary (P5-a recharts + P5-c MiniSearch + P5-b/P5-f audit + P5-d browserslist-null-result + P5-g bleed verification — 4-of-7 resolved, P5-e #545 investigation pending, P5-g done) and (b) any new smells post-#548 bleed matrix. If bandwidth → spot-check that #550 BackInStockSubscription doesn't collide with #552 WishlistSubscription wire-up (both are sold-item notify flows — need clear domain separation: WishlistSubscription = 'I wishlisted THIS unique piece, notify me when sold-out with similar', BackInStockSubscription = 'generic size+brand alert when new matching item arrives'). Gates green expected at HEAD 46336b1 (tsc 0, lint 0/0, 14-cycle green streak).
cycle_4903_directive.priority_rationale: Bolt pivot from Phase 5 bundle grinding to Phase 4 verification (#551) + new-feature leverage (#552 wishlist-sold wire-up, 40% CR) because Phase 5 single-file wins are largely harvested (P5-a + P5-c landed, P5-d null-result, P5-g clean, P5-f dupe-audit clean). Remaining P5-e vaul is demoted to investigation and P5-b is documentation — diminishing returns vs wiring up an unwired 40%-CR revenue-recovery path. Sage stays on brand-email-template pipeline at 1/cycle cadence; welcome landed clean means review-request is next natural template. Trace audit-first alignment is decisive at 7 cycles — lean into it with Phase 5 consolidation rather than pushing against it.
